findings.description: 13 PascalCase class names referenced in the WorkflowInstanceDao description are present in the knowledge section text but absent from the hints array: InstanceDao, InstanceFlowNodeDao, TaskAssignedUserDao, TaskAssignedGroupDao, ActiveFlowNodeDao, ActiveUserTaskDao, ActiveGroupTaskDao (delegation classes), and WorkflowInstanceEntity, TaskAssignedUserEntity, TaskAssignedGroupEntity, ActiveFlowNodeEntity, ActiveUserTaskEntity, ActiveGroupTaskEntity (entity classes).
findings.source_evidence: WorkflowInstanceDao row in source lists all 7 delegation classes and 6 entity classes by PascalCase name.

findings.description: The source H2 '構造' contains three H3 subsections (クラス図, インタフェース定義, クラス定義) and the combined plain-text content is well over 2000 characters, yet the knowledge file maps everything to a single section s1 without splitting on H3 boundaries.
